race.comment: DAMASCUS GATE (5) proven at the trip and ready for this grade after a dominant all-the-way win over 1600m at Taree. Maps well here and will take stopping again. FIVE RINGS (4) finished 3 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1400m at Grafton a week ago. Steps up in distance today. Backmarker who gets home hard. Will prove tough to beat. STROBING (9) has a win over 2100m and ready for the extra distance. Closed strongly when fourth over 1605m at Tuncurry eight days ago. Finds an easier assignment with race fitness on his side. ROCK THE MACHINE (8) is a last-start winner kept fresh. Chasing his third-straight victory and looks up to this after getting the job done over 1815m here in weaker grade. Each way. MORTLAKE (2) is a last-start winner who was rewarded for his consistency over the 2100m at Gosford last start. Placed here two back and keep safe.
